feed.title: lumi's trashcan
feed.subtitle: a personal trashcan for thoughts, ideas, random reviews, and guides.

entry.title: Advent of Code 2022, Day 03 in Rust

link.title: Advent of Code 2022, Day 03 in Rust

entry.summary: Getting to the third day, things are a slight bit more complicated this time. Solving the first part Each rucksack has two large compartments. All items of a given type are meant to go into exactly one of the two compartments. The Elf that did the packing failed to follow this rule for exactly one item type per rucksack. The Elves have made a list of all of the items currently in each r...

entry.title: Advent of Code 2022, Day 02 in Rust

link.title: Advent of Code 2022, Day 02 in Rust

entry.summary: Time for the second day of Advent of Code! Solving the first part Appreciative of your help yesterday, one Elf gives you an encrypted strategy guide (your puzzle input) that they say will be sure to help you win. “The first column is what your opponent is going to play: A for Rock, B for Paper, and C for Scissors. The second column–” Suddenly, the Elf is called away to help with someone’s ...

entry.title: Advent of Code 2022, Day 01 in Rust

link.title: Advent of Code 2022, Day 01 in Rust

entry.summary: It’s that time of the year again! December has started, and once again, another Advent of Code starts! For this year, I’ll attempt to solve the puzzles on the days they are released, with solutions written mainly in Rust. For some puzzles, I shall try to up the ante by writing a solution in Game Boy-flavored C. Setting up my setup environment I will be generating my code repository using fspo...

entry.title: Understanding maimaiでらっくす's Rating System

link.title: Understanding maimaiでらっくす's Rating System

entry.summary: (Update 01/12/2022: As pointed out by Amasugi, maimaiでらっくす’s ranking doesn’t have the E-F ranks anymore, instead replaced by BB and BBB. I’ve updated the table below to reflect that!) I have been playing maimaiでらっくす for a couple of months now, and personally, I am very intrigued by the internal workings of the game. Sadly, I am not very knowledgeable in terms of arcade hardware, software and n...

entry.title: Yuru Camp: A chill camping experience from home

link.title: Yuru Camp: A chill camping experience from home

entry.summary: I’ll be honest, I’m a gigantic sucker for slice-of-life anime. My anime list is literally chock-full of slice-of-life, with only a few selective shounens here and there. Most of the slice-of-life stuff are, as expected, mundane, basic and niche. But, one slice-of-life anime that truly struck different from everything else, is Yuru Camp. Premise So, what is Yuru Camp? It’s an anime about a gro...
